sites.name: Mews Lane Assemblage
sites.summary: Inner-suburban townhouse site with existing Archicad concept model and live construction planning data.

sites.name: River Road Infill
sites.summary: Smaller infill site used to compare duplex and compact townhouse feasibility before model authoring.

site_constraints.title: Neighbourhood height control
site_constraints.description: Two-storey street wall is generally acceptable; third-storey bulk requires setback testing.

site_constraints.title: Rear drainage easement
site_constraints.description: Stormwater spine constrains basement and private open-space layouts near the rear boundary.

site_constraints.title: Vehicle access width
site_constraints.description: Crossover and driveway width limit the practical yield for rear dwellings.

site_constraints.title: Flood overlay check
site_constraints.description: Confirm finished floor level and drainage detention requirements before acquisition commitment.

scenario_options.name: 3 Townhouse Premium
scenario_options.summary: Lower planning risk with larger dwellings, stronger end value, and current baseline schedule.

scenario_options.name: 4 Townhouse Yield
scenario_options.summary: Higher yield option using the recovery scenario for tighter sequencing and sales release testing.

scenario_options.name: Duplex Base Case
scenario_options.summary: Early feasibility option without an Archicad model; used to test acquisition and planning constraints.

scenario_cost_ranges.label: Low
scenario_cost_ranges.notes: Assumes no authority-driven redesign and stable civil scope.

scenario_cost_ranges.label: Mid
scenario_cost_ranges.notes: Base estimating case aligned to current package and schedule model.

scenario_cost_ranges.label: High
scenario_cost_ranges.notes: Includes services easement risk and extended approval period.

scenario_cost_ranges.label: Low
scenario_cost_ranges.notes: Assumes compact layouts pass with minor design changes.

scenario_cost_ranges.label: Mid
scenario_cost_ranges.notes: Includes additional facade and fire-separation allowances.

scenario_cost_ranges.label: High
scenario_cost_ranges.notes: Planning redesign and slower sales release sensitivity.

scenario_cost_ranges.label: Low
scenario_cost_ranges.notes: Clean planning pathway and no flood mitigation allowance.

scenario_cost_ranges.label: Mid
scenario_cost_ranges.notes: Screening case pending drainage and access advice.

scenario_cost_ranges.label: High
scenario_cost_ranges.notes: Includes flood overlay and slower authority pathway sensitivity.

sales_assumptions.notes: Premium larger townhouse product with staggered private treaty release.
Higher count with slightly lower average price and longer release.
Comparable infill duplex sales from recent nearby campaigns.

archicad_links.model_scope: baseline zones, siteworks, facade screen, and package-linked elements
draft yield model linked to recovery schedule scenario

master_code_catalogs.name: Global Residential Cost and Construction Codes
master_code_catalogs.description: Editable shared code catalog for feasibility cost items, construction trades, and work packages.

master_cost_templates.name: Townhouse Standard
master_cost_templates.description: Reusable townhouse feasibility template from loose sqm allowances through elemental and material-level lines.

master_cost_templates.name: Duplex Base
master_cost_templates.description: Early duplex feasibility library with provisional sums and core building system allowances.

master_cost_template_items.title: Townhouse building allowance
master_cost_template_items.notes: Loose feasibility rate before full elemental takeoff.

master_cost_template_items.title: Services authority upgrade provisional sum
master_cost_template_items.notes: Carries unresolved authority and easement scope.

master_cost_template_items.title: Facade screen assembly
master_cost_template_items.notes: Can link to BuildSync facade assembly task metadata.

master_cost_template_items.title: Facade stainless screws and fixings
master_cost_template_items.notes: Fine-grained takeoff item under the facade assembly.

master_cost_template_items.title: Duplex building allowance
master_cost_template_items.notes: Base cost per sqm for early duplex screening.

master_cost_template_items.title: Flood and drainage provisional sum
master_cost_template_items.notes: Risk allowance tied to flood overlay review.

master_cost_item_links.notes: Links facade assembly allowance to BuildSync/Archicad task metadata.
Services provisional sum tracks the rear drainage easement constraint.

scenario_cost_plan_items.title: Townhouse building allowance
scenario_cost_plan_items.notes: Gross floor area allowance for 3 townhouse option.

scenario_cost_plan_items.title: Facade screen assembly
scenario_cost_plan_items.notes: Linked to current Archicad facade screen object.

scenario_cost_plan_items.title: Duplex building allowance
scenario_cost_plan_items.notes: Loose per sqm cost before Archicad model authoring.
